untranslatable_reason: Signal requires estimation of fundamental value and analyst confidence scores, which are not measurable from OHLCV market data or the allowed indicators. Fundamental value analysis, proprietary data sources, and confidence scoring are external inputs that cannot be operationalized with available technical indicators. The signal is inherently discretionary and information-dependent rather than algorithmic.
translation_notes: This signal cannot be reliably translated to quantitative rules because it depends on: (1) estimated fundamental value (unmeasurable from price/volume alone), (2) proprietary or non-public information sources, (3) analyst confidence scores (subjective external input), and (4) thresholds marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] which are unspecified. A proxy was attempted using price deviations from nominal value (close relative to 1.0), but this does not capture the true logic of value-based trading requiring external fundamental analysis.
